primarySetting: The whole story takes place in and immediately around the child's own home at night: the child's bedroom, the bedroom window area, and a small safe home balcony / under-window drip area. This is one continuous home-night setting, not a journey. The child and Uri move only within this small connected set.

fixedAnchors.label: same child bedroom
fixedAnchors.description: Same child bedroom at night with bed, window, curtains, warm lamp glow

fixedAnchors.label: same child bed
fixedAnchors.description: Same bed in the same bedroom every time the bedroom appears

fixedAnchors.label: same window
fixedAnchors.description: Same bedroom window and curtains — gateway to the small safe balcony/drip area

fixedAnchors.label: same metal bucket
fixedAnchors.description: Same small galvanized METAL bucket under/near the drip source — dull silver/galvanized metal, NOT plastic, NOT a blue toy pail — one object, not redesigned each page

fixedAnchors.label: same drip source
fixedAnchors.description: Same drip source: water drips slowly from the stone/plaster WINDOW LEDGE directly above the bucket — gentle drip from the ledge edge. NEVER a downspout, gutter, drainpipe, faucet, wall pipe, roof pipe, or tap.

fixedAnchors.label: same moonlit home night
fixedAnchors.description: Same moonlit night with warm indoor light and soft lantern glow relationship

allowedZones.description: Inside the same child bedroom at night. Same bed, window, curtains, warm lamp/faint moonlight. Bucket/drip may be hinted near the window but not yet dominate.
stableGeometry: warm lamp or faint moonlight through window
allowedCameraAccess: medium wide showing bed and window

allowedZones.description: Transition between bedroom window/door and the small safe balcony. Same window/curtain/door relationship. No high-balcony drama.
stableGeometry: window/door opens to small safe balcony
low safe railing or wall edge
same floor transition from bedroom to balcony

allowedZones.description: Small safe home balcony or under-window outdoor corner. Same metal bucket under/near a drip source. Same floor/railing/wall relationship. No garden journey, no stream, no rooftop, no cliff.
stableGeometry: small enclosed home balcony or under-window corner

allowedZones.description: Close area around the same metal bucket and same drip source. Bucket may be viewed from different angles but remains the same object in the same physical zone. Water stays in/near bucket; no open water.
stableGeometry: same bucket on same balcony floor

allowedZones.description: Warm closing beat returning to the same bedroom/window/bucket world. The night now feels friendly and musical.
stableGeometry: same bedroom or same bucket zone as earlier pages

forbiddenDrift: bucket under bed unless story text explicitly says so
under-bed scene unless story text says so
transitionRules: Move only between zones of the same home-night cluster — bedroom, window, small safe balcony, bucket area.
Camera moves; the set does not redesign.
Balcony must feel safe, enclosed, home-like, child-safe — never high, cliff-like, or rooftop-like.

visibleAnchors: child + fox companion with neck lantern
pagePlans.cameraPositionHint: INSIDE child's bedroom near the night window — Noya + Uri curious, lantern/flashlight mystery mood. Title-safe band at top.
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Soft suspense curiosity; moonlit window view from inside room
pagePlans.pageAction: Noya and Uri inside the bedroom near the night window — curious, soft suspense, lantern/flashlight mood. A mysterious sound is hinted outside but the solution is NOT shown. NO bucket. NO drip. NO falling water.

visualSpoilerPolicy.note: Cover preserves mystery — inside bedroom near window, no bucket or drip solution visible

visibleAnchors: hint of drip sound near window
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Establish bedroom-window world; moonlit home night
pagePlans.pageAction: Noa hears a mysterious sound at the window; Uri startles and jumps. NO visible bucket, NO drip source, NO water-catching object.

visualSpoilerPolicy.note: Sound mystery only — no visible bucket or drip solution

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Flashlight cone may move; same room
pagePlans.pageAction: Uri holds the courage-meter flashlight upside-down so the light shines on his own nose. NO bucket visible.

visualSpoilerPolicy.note: Flashlight comedy beat — bucket still hidden

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Rhythm game near window; same set
pagePlans.pageAction: Noa counts the rhythm aloud; Uri writes in an imaginary scout notebook. NO bucket visible.

visualSpoilerPolicy.note: Rhythm game at window — solution not yet revealed

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Finger tap on same railing; threshold beat
pagePlans.pageAction: Noa taps a DRY balcony metal-bar railing; Uri's tail betrays his fear. NO bucket, NO water on railing.

visualSpoilerPolicy.note: Dry railing tap — bucket reveal comes next page

pagePlans.cameraPositionHint: Reveal the same metal bucket near window/balcony drip — NOT under bed
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Flashlight may roll; bucket is discovered in same drip zone
pagePlans.pageAction: The flashlight rolls and REVEALS the old galvanized metal bucket for the FIRST time under the window-ledge drip.

visualSpoilerPolicy.note: FIRST REVEAL of the metal bucket

pagePlans.pageAction: Noa leans her ear close to the bucket rim; Uri holds the flashlight like a trembling sword.

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Hand near same bucket; water in bucket only
pagePlans.pageAction: A single drop falls; Noa's fingertip touches the cold drop — close on hand and drop.

visibleAnchors: child and fox at same bucket
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Playful duet staging — NOT static sitting near bucket
pagePlans.pageAction: Uri talks to the rain/bucket in a funny official voice; Noa plays along — a duet, mid-gesture, playful movement.
Noa presses her ear to the bucket, recognizing a rhythm; musical listening feel.

visibleAnchors: child gently shifting same bucket under drip
pagePlans.cameraPositionHint: Gentle sideways shift of SAME bucket under SAME drip — not pouring into open water
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Bucket moves slightly within same drip zone only
pagePlans.pageAction: Noa GRIPS the bucket handle and SLIDES it sideways under the drip; Uri holds the lantern like a stage spotlight.

visibleAnchors: playful tapping on same bucket rim
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Musical play at same bucket — drumming comedy
pagePlans.pageAction: Noa DRUMS on the bucket rim; Uri makes funny mouth-drum sounds; water rhythm playful, joyful movement.

visibleAnchors: same still bucket OR same window/bedroom
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Warm resolution in same home-night world
pagePlans.pageAction: Last drop; Noa switches the flashlight off; quiet warm resolution, slightly wider framing.
